description: User clicked the 'Next' button to move from sourcing participants to participant location.
frame_description: The user is on the 'How would you like to source participants' screen and clicks 'Next' with 'Askable Panel' selected.

description: User changed the participant location selection from Australia to United States.
frame_description: The selected location in the input field changes from 'Australia' to 'United States', and the map view updates accordingly.

description: The page navigated from Participant location to Demographic filters.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the map-based location selection to the demographic filters configuration page.
